/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/retro_poker.dir/aiplayer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/retro_poker.dir/constants.cpp.o CMakeFiles/retro_poker.dir/game.cpp.o CMakeFiles/retro_poker.dir/handevoluator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/retro_poker.dir/logger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/retro_poker.dir/player.cpp.o CMakeFiles/retro_poker.dir/plays.cpp.o CMakeFiles/retro_poker.dir/utils.cpp.o -o retro_poker
